title: Question history component with expandable items and clear functionality
purpose: Displays a list of previous questions with expandable details and provides options to clear the history. Used in the question panel to show user's question history.
module_context: Exports a QuestionHistory component that uses a React state hook and a question store for managing history data. Includes a nested HistoryItem component for rendering individual history entries.

steps.content: Initialize state for tracking expanded history item.
Load question history from the store and limit to maxItems.
Render empty state message if no history items exist.
Render header with history count and clear button.
Map over history items and render each as a HistoryItem component.
Show footer message if there are more items than maxItems.
Toggle the expanded state for the specified question ID.
IF the ID matches the currently expanded item, collapse it.
Prompt user for confirmation before clearing history.
IF user confirms, call the clearHistory function from the store.

methods.name: HistoryItem
methods.normalized_params: (props: { question: Question; isExpanded: boolean; onToggle: () => void; onSelect?: (question: Question) => void }): React.ReactElement

steps.content: Truncate question text for display in the list view.
Render the toggle button with appropriate arrow icon.
IF item is expanded, render the full question details and context.
IF onSelect callback is provided, render a button to view item in panel.
